metadata.description: Historical base rates for war outcomes — used to calibrate simulation predictions
metadata.purpose: Superforecasters' #1 tool. Without base rates, predictions are just guesses.

kosovo_1999.ended_by: Russia abandoned Serbia, NATO air superiority

desert_storm_air_1991.ended_by: Air campaign achieved objectives, ground phase was 100 hours

asymmetric_warfare_outcomes.source: Arreguin-Toft, How the Weak Win Wars, Cambridge 2005
asymmetric_warfare_outcomes.key_finding: When weak side uses INDIRECT strategy (attrition, guerrilla, economic bleeding) against strong side using DIRECT strategy (conventional force), weak side wins majority of the time post-1950
asymmetric_warfare_outcomes.iran_strategy_classification: INDIRECT — asymmetric missile/drone attrition, proxy network, economic leverage via Hormuz, strategic patience
asymmetric_warfare_outcomes.us_israel_strategy_classification: DIRECT — conventional air strikes, precision munitions, technological superiority

clausewitz_three_reasons.inability_to_continue: Military defeat — forces destroyed or territory captured
clausewitz_three_reasons.improbability_of_victory: Stalemate recognition — both sides realize they cannot win
clausewitz_three_reasons.unacceptable_cost: Cost exceeds political objectives — domestic pressure forces end

iran_iraq_war_1980_1988.ended_by: Iran concluded it faced unwinnable escalation after US Navy destroyed half its fleet (Operation Praying Mantis) + USS Vincennes shot down civilian airliner (290 dead). Iran interpreted as signal US would escalate without limit.
iran_iraq_war_1980_1988.demands_outcome: Iran demanded Iraq named 'aggressor' (enabling reparations) — REJECTED. Iran accepted 'poisoned chalice' ceasefire without reparations.
iran_iraq_war_1980_1988.relevance: Iran's current reparation demands mirror 1988 — likely maximalist opening position. But key difference: war is 25 days old not 8 years. Mojtaba Khamenei more hardline than his father.

yom_kippur_war_1973.ended_by: Israeli counter-encirclement of Egyptian Third Army created mutual leverage. US-Soviet nuclear brinksmanship (DEFCON 3) forced superpower-imposed ceasefire.
yom_kippur_war_1973.oil_weapon: OPEC embargo quadrupled oil prices, forced US to pressure Israel into concessions
yom_kippur_war_1973.relevance: Israel's interceptor crisis mirrors 1973 tank losses. Oil weapon ($119/bbl) is even more potent today. Pattern: Israel's military reality forces political accommodation.

suez_crisis_1956.ended_by: US economic coercion against its OWN ALLY (Britain). Eisenhower threatened to destroy pound sterling. Britain losing 100M pounds/week.
suez_crisis_1956.relevance: Model for how GCC states could force US to negotiate by threatening US basing rights, oil production decisions, or dollar transactions. Qatar hosting CENTCOM HQ gives it direct leverage.

vietnam_war.ended_by: Military stalemate + domestic political pressure. Nixon's Vietnamization. Paris Peace Accords gave face-saving exit.
vietnam_war.relevance: US domestic pressure threshold is far lower today. 45 US casualties in 25 days is approaching political sensitivity zone. Trump's '5-day pause' announcement = domestic/economic pressure already influencing decisions.

falklands_war_1982.ended_by: Decisive British military victory — Argentine garrison surrendered
falklands_war_1982.relevance: Benchmark for modern air/naval conflict: 10 weeks. Current conflict (Day 25) is roughly 1/3 through typical duration. But Iran has no territory to 'surrender' and missile production regenerates the threat.

kosovo_1999.ended_by: Russia abandoned Serbia diplomatically, enabling NATO to impose terms
kosovo_1999.relevance: CRITICAL: Air campaigns alone take ~78 days when they work AND require target state's major ally to abandon them. China is doing OPPOSITE — providing intelligence to Iran. Without China abandoning Iran, air campaign alone cannot force capitulation.

economic_pressure_effectiveness.sanctions_against_large_ideological_stat: Historically INCREASES resistance rather than forcing capitulation
economic_pressure_effectiveness.iran_specific: Iran endured 8 years of war with Iraq under extreme economic strain. Current sanctions since 2018. IRGC-dominated leadership has eschatological worldview that deprioritizes economic suffering.

ceasefire_durability.key_factor: Ceasefires with third-party enforcement (UN peacekeepers) are 2x more durable than those without

nuclear_threshold_dynamics.key_finding: Wars between nuclear/near-nuclear states end through exhaustion or political accommodation, not military victory. Subjugation is not a plausible outcome.
nuclear_threshold_dynamics.80_year_nuclear_firebreak: No nuclear weapon has been used in combat since 1945. This norm is the strongest constraint on escalation.
nuclear_threshold_dynamics.iran_breakout_context: Iran's breakout time was <1 week pre-war. Even with strikes on enrichment facilities, Fordow survived (80m underground). The nuclear dimension constrains all parties.

base_rate_prediction.war_extends_beyond_1_year: 25% (but if it does, likely extends to 5-10 years)
base_rate_prediction.iran_wins_asymmetric: 51% if applying post-1950 asymmetric warfare rates

adjustment_factors.iran_reparation_demands_delay_settlement: +30 days as demands are negotiated down
